title: Robin Is Pulled Toward the Gate
description: The Straw Hats and their allies force their way deeper into Enies Lobby while guards and agents scramble to stop them.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, 18, 19, this part follows Sogeking, Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Franky. The Straw Hats and their allies force their way deeper into Enies Lobby while guards and agents scramble to stop them.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Holy Cow! The HOUBantai were defeated!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: normal people can't match our speed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We'll pierce you before you even notice!

summary: The Straw Hats and their allies force their way deeper into Enies Lobby while guards and agents scramble to stop them.
